title: arrhenatherum natalense
intro: Arrhenatherum natalense, also known as Natal False Oat-grass, is a perennial grass native to South Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum natalense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses.
